## Summary

- what changed:
- why:

## Change type

- [ ] bug fix
- [ ] public API change
- [ ] internal refactor
- [ ] docs update
- [ ] test / CI / engineering update

## Public contract check

- [ ] no public contract impact
- [ ] public contract changed and README was updated
- [ ] public/internal boundary changed and stability notes were updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated when needed

## Validation

- [ ] `composer test`
- [ ] `composer analyse`
- [ ] CI expected to pass

## Notes

Please mention explicitly if the change belongs to:

- core public behavior
- internal runtime structure only
- project adapter-layer guidance only

Do not silently push project-specific legacy helper behavior back into the core package.
